title: The Keyboard
content:
After the long wait, finally it came ... [The Keyboard][3].

[![][1]][2]

Might take a little getting used to but I think I like the first impression already.

Next thing, [The Phone][4].

[2]: http://www.flickr.com/photos/macsfbox/1349900440/
[3]: http://www.apple.com/keyboard/
[4]: http://www.apple.com/iphone/
